extra.reason: Implemented: base-image Dockerfile + build config, nightly CI workflow with upstream-version check/smoke/release, versions+smoke scripts, devcontainer.json switched to prebuilt image, update-content-base.sh slimmed to runtime-only, docs (AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md/README). Validated: shellcheck, actionlint, hadolint, jsonc parse, live run of versions script, adversarial 16-agent review (2 findings fixed). Actual image build happens in CI on first push (no docker in this container).

Homebrew fully removed. Official installs: apt (tmux/ripgrep), pandoc GH .deb, dolt install.sh, beads checksum-verified tarball, Claude native installer (cross-builds reproduce layout without executing Bun binary under QEMU), Codex static musl binary, htmlq cargo build stage. Manifest tracks GH release redirects/crates.io/Anthropic feed. All sequences executed verbatim locally; lints clean; 24-agent review confirmed 2 doc issues, fixed.
